title: Level 1: Foundations - Introducing the Phrase
description: Foundational concepts including basic phrases, pronunciation, and simple sentence structures using ko and he.

wrapUpContent.title: Level 1: Foundations Complete!
wrapUpContent.summary: You have completed the foundational level of te reo Māori grammar focusing on basic phrases and simple sentence structures.
keyPoints: Correct pronunciation of vowels and consonants
Simple sentence structures with ko and he
wrapUpContent.nextSteps: Continue to Level 2 to expand your understanding of phrase structures.

title: Level 2: Expanding Phrase Structures
description: Build on foundational knowledge with possessive phrases, locative phrases, and basic verbal sentences.

wrapUpContent.title: Level 2: Expanding Phrase Structures Complete!
wrapUpContent.summary: You have expanded your knowledge of te reo Māori phrase structures and basic verbal sentences.
wrapUpContent.nextSteps: Move on to Level 3-4 to learn intermediate grammatical structures.

title: Level 3-4: Intermediate Structures (Part 1)
description: Intermediate grammatical concepts focusing on A and O possessives and transitive verbs.

wrapUpContent.title: Level 3-4: Intermediate Structures (Part 1) Complete!
wrapUpContent.summary: You have completed the first part of intermediate level te reo Māori grammar.
keyPoints: A and O categories of possession
wrapUpContent.nextSteps: Continue to Level 3-4 Part 2 for more intermediate structures.

title: Level 3-4: Intermediate Structures (Part 2)
description: Continuing intermediate concepts with experience/stative verbs and object markers.

wrapUpContent.title: Level 3-4: Intermediate Structures (Part 2) Complete!
wrapUpContent.summary: You now understand different verb types and more complex verbal structures.
wrapUpContent.nextSteps: Progress to Level 5-6 for more advanced grammatical concepts.

title: Level 5-6: Complex Structures (Part 1)
description: Complex grammatical structures focusing on relative clauses and expressing opinions.

wrapUpContent.title: Level 5-6: Complex Structures (Part 1) Complete!
wrapUpContent.summary: You now have a solid understanding of relative clauses and expressing opinions.
wrapUpContent.nextSteps: Continue to Level 5-6 Part 2 for additional complex structures.

title: Level 5-6: Complex Structures (Part 2)
description: Advanced complex structures for giving reasons and discussing future plans.

wrapUpContent.title: Level 5-6: Complex Structures (Part 2) Complete!
wrapUpContent.summary: You can now construct sophisticated sentences, give reasons, and discuss future plans.
wrapUpContent.nextSteps: Move on to Level 7-8 for advanced grammar concepts.

title: Level 7-8: Advanced Grammar (Part 1)
description: Advanced grammatical concepts focusing on abstract topics and complex sentence structures.

wrapUpContent.title: Level 7-8: Advanced Grammar (Part 1) Complete!
wrapUpContent.summary: You can now discuss abstract topics and use sophisticated sentence structures.
wrapUpContent.nextSteps: Continue to Level 7-8 Part 2 for formal writing and argumentation.

title: Level 7-8: Advanced Grammar (Part 2)
description: Mastering advanced grammar for formal writing and presenting arguments.

wrapUpContent.title: Level 7-8: Advanced Grammar (Part 2) Complete!
wrapUpContent.summary: You now have a comprehensive understanding of advanced te reo Māori grammar.
wrapUpContent.nextSteps: Continue practicing te reo Māori in increasingly complex contexts.

title: Specialized Topics
description: Specialized grammatical topics and extended concepts for fluent speakers.

wrapUpContent.title: Specialized Topics Complete!
wrapUpContent.summary: You've now covered specialized topics in te reo Māori grammar that go beyond the fundamentals and into the nuances of the language.
wrapUpContent.nextSteps: Continue your language journey with immersive practice, conversation groups, and additional resources for mastery.

title: Beginner Core: Hello & Basics
description: A gentle introduction to the most common phrases and greetings used in daily life.

wrapUpContent.title: Beginner Core 1 Complete!
wrapUpContent.summary: You've taken your first steps into conversational Māori!
wrapUpContent.nextSteps: Move on to Beginner Core 2 to learn about yourself and your family.

title: Beginner Core: Me & My Family
description: Learn how to introduce yourself and talk about your family members.

wrapUpContent.title: Beginner Core 2 Complete!
wrapUpContent.summary: You can now share basic information about your life and family.
wrapUpContent.nextSteps: You're ready to explore the full Grammar Focus stream for a deeper dive!

title: Vocabulary Essentials
description: Master the first 100 most common words in te reo Māori.

wrapUpContent.title: Vocabulary Essentials Complete!
wrapUpContent.summary: You've built a solid foundation of common vocabulary.
wrapUpContent.nextSteps: Try the Grammar Focus stream to see how these words fit into sentences!
